children.title: A 30-Day Roadmap for Starting a Startup in Bangladesh
children.fullTitle: A 30-Day Roadmap for Starting a Startup in Bangladesh
children.description: Use 30 days to find problem evidence, make a priced offer, ask for real commitment, and deliver a small pilot.

children.title: Common Myths Bangladeshi Founders Believe
children.fullTitle: Common Myths Bangladeshi Founders Believe
children.description: The fear of idea theft, the dream of raising funding first, mistaking discount sales for demand. Eight familiar myths Bangladeshi founders believe, each with the real picture and one action.

children.title: Founder Path Chooser
children.fullTitle: Founder Path Chooser
children.description: Of the hundreds of pages on this site, you need three or four right now. Match yourself to one of six familiar situations and get a reading order for each.

children.title: Founder Readiness Checklist
children.fullTitle: Founder Readiness Checklist
children.description: Before you start a business, test yourself in five areas: skills, time, money, family, and mindset. An honest 20-tick checklist, with a to-do list for every gap you find.

children.title: One-Page Startup Plan
children.fullTitle: One-Page Startup Plan
children.description: Not a forty-page business plan – a one-page grid of twelve questions. Copy it and fill it in within half an hour, with a fully worked example: Tanvir's pickle business.

children.title: Should You Build a Startup or a Conventional Business?
children.fullTitle: Should You Build a Startup or a Conventional Business?
children.description: Compare the idea's growth path with your household runway, ownership preferences, and capacity for risk before choosing.

children.title: Startup Glossary: Bangla-English Startup Terms
children.fullTitle: Startup Glossary: Bangla-English Startup Terms
children.description: Plain-language meanings of the 70+ English terms you meet in investor meetings, startup circles, and on this site, each with a Bangladeshi example and the taka maths.

children.title: Startup, SME, Agency, and E-commerce: What Is the Difference?
children.fullTitle: Startup, SME, Agency, and E-commerce: What Is the Difference?
children.description: These four labels do not describe the same thing. Identify what you sell, where you sell, and how the business grows.

children.title: What Is a Startup?
children.fullTitle: What Is a Startup?
children.description: A new business is not automatically a startup. Learn what scale means, how startup uncertainty works, and how to test your own idea.
